series.curator_notes: Music/song series (not narrative Hörspiel). Features themed collections (vehicles, seasons, animals, sleep/Christmas/play songs) and character albums (Milo, Bagger Mats, Willi von der Wasserwacht, Kalle Klang, etc.). Main numbered sequence is 'Sing mit mir Kinderlieder' (vols. 1-4). Includes spinoffs like 'Papa Müsli'.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.
